methods.description: Process for selecting and sampling populations of the genus Hippophae for phylogenetic and dating analyses.

steps.description: Sampled three populations for each distinct taxon of the genus Hippophae based on Swenson and Bartish (2002) and geographic information.
steps.searchable_summary: select and sample populations of Hippophae based on geographic information

steps.description: Selected three representative populations across geographic range for taxa with unresolved phylogeographic relationships.
steps.searchable_summary: select representative populations for taxa with unresolved phylogeographic relationships

steps.description: Used three populations to represent closely related subspecies with shared cpDNA haplotype.
steps.searchable_summary: select populations to represent closely related subspecies with shared cpDNA haplotype

methods.description: Procedure for isolating genomic DNA and sequencing chloroplast and nuclear DNA regions for phylogenetic analysis.

steps.description: Isolated total genomic DNA from silica gel dried leaves using DNeasy TM Tissue Kit.
steps.searchable_summary: isolate genomic DNA from dried leaves using DNeasy Tissue Kit

steps.description: Sequenced five chloroplast DNA and five nuclear DNA regions for all taxa.
steps.searchable_summary: sequence chloroplast and nuclear DNA regions

steps.description: Performed PCR in 25 µL reaction mixture volumes using Taq DNA polymerase.
steps.searchable_summary: perform PCR using Taq DNA polymerase

steps.description: Purified PCR products using QIAquick PCR Purification Kit.
steps.searchable_summary: purify PCR products using QIAquick PCR Purification Kit

steps.description: Conducted sequencing reactions with ABI Prism Bigdye TM Terminator v.3.1 Cycle Sequencing Kit.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct sequencing reactions using ABI Prism Bigdye Terminator Kit

steps.description: Obtained sequences using an ABI 3130 Genetic Analyzer.
steps.searchable_summary: obtain sequences using ABI 3130 Genetic Analyzer

methods.method_name: Sequence Alignment and Data Set Preparation
methods.description: Aligning and preparing chloroplast and nuclear DNA sequences for phylogenetic analysis.

steps.description: Aligned produced sequences using MEGA v.4 and adjusted them manually.
steps.searchable_summary: align DNA sequences using MEGA v.4

steps.description: Concatenated chloroplast and nuclear sequences separately to make two data sets.
steps.searchable_summary: concatenate chloroplast and nuclear sequences into separate data sets

steps.description: Chose Rhamnus davurica as outgroup to root the tree and obtained outgroup sequences from GenBank.
steps.searchable_summary: select outgroup and obtain sequences from GenBank

steps.description: Deposited newly generated sequences in GenBank.
Used GAPCODER to edit indels as separate characters for inclusion in Bayesian analyses.
steps.searchable_summary: edit indels using GAPCODER for Bayesian analysis
